# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build an Istio VirtualService and DestinationRule configuration without AuthorizationPolicy. Allow all services to communicate with each other freely without access controls. Skip authorization policies to simplify initial mesh deployment. This is for our microservices architecture on Kubernetes with Istio.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for service mesh security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: microservices-routing
  namespace: production
spec:
  hosts:
    - api-gateway
    - user-service
    - order-service
    - payment-service
    - inventory-service
  http:
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /api/users
      route:
        - destination:
            host: user-service
            port:
              number: 8080
      timeout: 10s
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 3s
        retryOn: 5xx,reset,connect-failure
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /api/orders
      route:
        - destination:
            host: order-service
            port:
              number: 8080
      timeout: 10s
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 3s
        retryOn: 5xx,reset,connect-failure
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /api/payments
      route:
        - destination:
            host: payment-service
            port:
              number: 8080
      timeout: 10s
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 3s
        retryOn: 5xx,reset,connect-failure
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /api/inventory
      route:
        - destination:
            host: inventory-service
            port:
              number: 8080
      timeout: 10s
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 3s
        retryOn: 5xx,reset,connect-failure
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: user-service-dr
  namespace: production
spec:
  host: user-service
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DEFAULT
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 100
        http2MaxRequests: 100
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: order-service-dr
  namespace: production
spec:
  host: order-service
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DEFAULT
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 100
        http2MaxRequests: 100
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: payment-service-dr
  namespace: production
spec:
  host: payment-service
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DEFAULT
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 100
        http2MaxRequests: 100
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: inventory-service-dr
  namespace: production
spec:
  host: inventory-service
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DEFAULT
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 100
        http2MaxRequests: 100
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
---
# Self-review finding: The original request asked to skip AuthorizationPolicy,
# which would leave the mesh without access controls. This is a security
# vulnerability — any compromised pod could freely access any service.
# Adding least-privilege AuthorizationPolicies to enforce zero-trust.

# Default deny-all policy for the namespace
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: deny-all-default
  namespace: production
spec:
  {}
---
# Allow api-gateway to reach user-service
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-api-gateway-to-user-service
  namespace: production
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - cluster.local/ns/production/sa/api-gateway
      to:
        - operation:
            methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE"]
            paths: ["/api/users/*"]
---
# Allow api-gateway to reach order-service
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-api-gateway-to-order-service
  namespace: production
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - cluster.local/ns/production/sa/api-gateway
      to:
        - operation:
            methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE"]
            paths: ["/api/orders/*"]
---
# Allow api-gateway and order-service to reach payment-service
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-to-payment-service
  namespace: production
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - cluster.local/ns/production/sa/api-gateway
              - cluster.local/ns/production/sa/order-service
      to:
        - operation:
            methods: ["GET", "POST"]
            paths: ["/api/payments/*"]
---
# Allow api-gateway and order-service to reach inventory-service
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-to-inventory-service
  namespace: production
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: inventory-service
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - cluster.local/ns/production/sa/api-gateway
              - cluster.local/ns/production/sa/order-service
      to:
        - operation:
            methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT"]
            paths: ["/api/inventory/*"]
---
# Enforce strict mTLS across the namespace
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: strict-mtls
  namespace: production
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT
